title: Daily Independent Journal — April 28, 1962 (Page 8)
author: Daily Independent Journal
card_summary: A clipped page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Saturday, April 28, 1962, page 8. Likely contains Philip K. Dick or events in his local environment during 1962.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Saturday, April 28, 1962, page 8. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com, originally clipped by researcher pwshelton8296 on August 12, 2024, and downloaded on April 5, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

This clipping dates from late April 1962, one week after the front-page clipping also preserved in this archive. The period was significant in Dick's career as The Man in the High Castle was published that year. The researcher's deliberate clipping of multiple pages from the same newspaper across several dates suggests a systematic effort to document Dick's local environment during key periods of his life.
